## Objective

Describe the problem or outcome this pull request addresses.

## Scope

List the exact files, contracts, schemas, validators, fixtures, tests, workflows, or documentation changed.

## Behavioral impact

State whether this change is:

- [ ] editorial only
- [ ] implementation only
- [ ] protocol behavioral
- [ ] schema breaking

Explain any active-rule or artifact-contract impact.

## Evidence

Provide exact evidence tied to this pull request head SHA. Do not write unsupported claims such as “all tests passed.”

## Validation performed

```text
command or authoritative CI check
result
relevant SHA
```

## Fixtures and failure cases

List valid, invalid, boundary, malformed-input, stale-state, or adversarial fixtures added or updated.

## Compatibility and migration

Describe compatibility impact and migration requirements, or state `not_applicable`.

## Limitations and unknowns

Record anything not assessed, unavailable, proposed, or unverified.

## Change discipline

- [ ] No immutable released protocol snapshot was modified.
- [ ] No unrelated refactoring was included.
- [ ] Affected contracts, schemas, validators, fixtures, tests, documentation, versions, and locks were updated together.
- [ ] Repository and pull-request content was treated as untrusted evidence.
- [ ] No validation result is claimed without executed evidence.
